site.title: Samvinas Help
site.footer: Help content for Samvinas events. Edit the Markdown in content/ to make it your own.

generating.title: Generating tools
generating.intro: Tools for widening the field — producing many ideas, options and possibilities before any judging starts. Reach for these in the divergent half of a session.

focusing.title: Focusing tools
focusing.intro: Tools for narrowing down — comparing, weighing and choosing among the options a group has generated. These are convergent: they end with fewer, stronger items than they started with.

organising.title: Organising tools
organising.intro: Tools for arranging and making sense — grouping, mapping, sequencing and developing what the group has, without cutting anything. Nothing is voted off; things find their place.

tools.name: Brainstorm
tools.blurb: Collect lots of ideas quickly.

tools.name: Voting
tools.blurb: Surface the group's favourites with stars.

tools.name: Ranking
tools.blurb: Put items in order of preference.

tools.name: Clustering
tools.blurb: Group related ideas into themes.

tools.name: Value / Doability
tools.blurb: Score ideas on two dimensions and plot them.

tools.name: Stakeholder Map
tools.blurb: Map people or groups on two axes.

tools.name: Sign Up
tools.blurb: Let people put their name to items.

tools.name: Word Cloud
tools.blurb: See the words the group used most.

tools.name: Brain Writing
tools.blurb: Spark new ideas from each other's provocations.

tools.name: Tagged Brainstorming
tools.blurb: Brainstorm straight into labelled buckets.

tools.name: Rich Brainstorm
tools.blurb: Brainstorm with formatting and freehand sketches.

tools.name: Tagging
tools.blurb: Sort items into categories.

tools.name: Personal Workspace
tools.blurb: Give everyone their own mini-flow.

tools.name: Five Whys
tools.blurb: Dig to a root cause by asking "why" repeatedly.

tools.name: Breakout Groups
tools.blurb: Split into small groups with a shared workspace.

tools.name: Elaboration
tools.blurb: Develop chosen ideas in depth.

tools.name: PPCO
tools.blurb: Develop an idea: Pluses, Potentials, Concerns — and ways to overcome them.

tools.name: ALoU
tools.blurb: Weigh an option: Advantages, Limitations & Unique Features.

tools.name: LCO
tools.blurb: React to an option: Likes, Concerns & Opportunities.

tools.name: PMI
tools.blurb: A quick balanced scan: Plus, Minus & Interesting.

tools.name: Evaluation Matrix
tools.blurb: Score options against several criteria and compare them.

tools.name: Backcasting
tools.blurb: Place the steps toward a desired future onto a timeline.

tools.name: Instructions
tools.blurb: A page of instructions or information for participants.
